message:
fix: correct excalidraw encryption format and text centering

- Rewrite upload.ts to match excalidraw's exact concatBuffers format:
  JWK key encoding, chunked buffer with version headers, deflate then
  encrypt with proper metadata wrapping
- Fix bound text positioning: use top-left of centered text bounding box
  instead of container center point
- Only return structuredContent widget for excalidraw format so URL
  format returns visible text
